channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dog fouling, 16th July
item.description:
Dog fouling on footpath behind the Iron horse public house
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle on pavement, 16th July
item.description:
Vehicle is parked on pavement blocking cyclists and pedestrians

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westerley Crescent, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 16th July
item.description:
Several times. A week this occurs mattresses, bags of rubbish, broken wooden cabinets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coxmount Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging and hitting private residence, 16th July
item.description:
The tree branches have been overhanging my house for a very long time. The branches are touching the exterior of my house and bang on the roof and guttering when it is windy and I am very concerned about the damage it will be doing to my property. People have come before to prune the tree but have not cut enough branches or sufficiently removed the excess foliage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Blaise Avenue, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Severed head of an animal dumped opposite nursery, 16th July
item.description:
Who dumps the severed head of an animal by a nursery?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copper Beech Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter needs picking in the shrub area and in front, 16th July
item.description:
Litter needs picking in the shrub/ bushes and in pavement in front of it on Suster Mabel's se15. I have marked where they are on the photos Please assist Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sister Mabel's Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden Waste, 16th July
item.description:
Outside 3G chalk pit avenue someone has dumped a pile of loose garden waste on the road, can you please clear.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Augustine Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Smashed glass everywhere down Pellerin rd, 16th July
item.description:
The recycling guys collecting this morning just left it. They picked up a bag that ripped and glass bottles smashed everywhere. They didn’t give a shit. Unbelievable.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 16th July
item.description:
Pothole outside 40 -42. When buses going over the pot it makes the windows on the houses vibrate.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Holmesdale Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of waste dumped on pavement - swarms of flies, 16th July
item.description:
There is black bags waste dumped on the pavement which has been ripped open and has swarms of hundreds flies on it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Birch Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose metal drain, 16th July
item.description:
There’s a metal drain opposite a tree on Woldham Road. It seems to have come loose as it makes a loud noise when a vehicle drives over it. It’s also caused an issue to vehicle before. We would appreciate this being fixed. Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Woldham Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip/ dumped furniture and assorted items in Kemnal road, 16th July
item.description:
As above

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kemnal Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on minnow walk, 16th July
item.description:
Near cycle hanger lots of fly tipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Minnow Street, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned wheelie bin, 16th July
item.description:
Please remove this abandoned wheelie bin from the bridge footpath please. Hazard to visually impaired.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Avery Hill Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tripping, 16th July
item.description:
Travel cot blocking the whole on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 47, Woolwich Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on Hitherfield Road, 16th July
item.description:
The rubbish has been placed just past 51 Hitherfield Road, opposite number 54.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lambeth Road, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised paving slabs, 16th July
item.description:
Paving slabs have raised in between 56/58 Chester Road going up in a V shape probably due to the trees roots very dangerous and a accident waiting to happen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chester Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unadopted bin, 16th July
item.description:
Please can you reclaim this wheelie bin from the grass area. It is unclaimed and is causing people to fly tip rubbish next to it. We already had a fridge and cupboard . Rubbish attracts rubbish.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 385, Old Farm Avenue, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of rubbish, 16th July
item.description:
House number 253 rangefield rd dumping their rubbish again in dead of night woke me up again Bromley council please can you contact these people and re attached flytip signs on lamppost’s as they been ripped off

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rangefield Road, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rusted metal cover, hole in ground, 16th July
item.description:
A metal cover has rusted and broken. Broken into a hole and very weak, risk of falling. Could be easily missed as amongst grass. Outside 827 Sidcup Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sidcup Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
